title: ensure_param_file: corrupt file removed before re-fetch; if fetch fails, file gone
description: params.rs ensure_param_file: when the cached file has a hash mismatch, it is deleted with std::fs::remove_file(path) before fetching. If the subsequent fetch fails (network down), the function returns Err but the file has already been deleted from disk. The next run will re-download. This is tracked as nie-qdlu.3 but that issue is listed as 'deletes before download' — confirming it is already filed. Skip as duplicate.
